title: ocimum amicorum
intro: Ocimum amicorum, also known as African Blue Basil, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The leaves and flowers of Ocimum amicorum have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is rich in vitamins A and C, as well as minerals such as potassium and iron, offering several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Ocimum amicorum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, essential oils, and dried extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
